account_id.description: The unique identifier for the AWS account associated with the budget.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the budget.

auto_adjust_data.description: Details about the automatic adjustments made to the budget, such as type and historical options.

budget_exceeded.description: Indicates whether the actual spending has exceeded the defined budget.

budget_limit.description: The set financial limit for the budget, including the amount and currency unit.

budget_type.description: Specifies the type of budget, such as cost, usage, or RI utilization.

calculated_spend.description: The actual spending calculated for the budget, including the amount and currency unit.

cost_filter.description: Filters applied to the budget to include specific costs.

cost_types.description: The types of costs included or excluded in the budget calculations.

id.description: The unique identifier of the budget within AWS.

notification.description: Notification settings for the budget, including comparison operators, thresholds, and subscriber information.

planned_limit.description: The planned spending limit over time, including amount, start time, and currency unit.

tags.description: Key-value pairs used to categorize and organize the budget.

time_period_end.description: The end date for the budget's time period.

time_period_start.description: The start date for the budget's time period.

time_unit.description: The unit of time (e.g., monthly, quarterly) used for the budget's time period.
